title: fluffy resilient croatian gobo-burdock casserole
description: a nostalgic croatian dish featuring gobo-burdock, lardons-render, and a resinous quality that will leave you wanting more.

ingredients.name: lardons-render
ingredients.notes: use a combination of bacon and pig fat for added flavor

ingredients.name: caraway seeds
ingredients.notes: adds a distinct flavor and texture

instructions: in a large pan over medium-high heat, render the lardons-render until crispy, then set aside
in the same pan, saut6 onion, caraway seeds, and garlic until softened
stir in paprika and cook for 1 minute
in a separate pan, boil the russet potatoes until tender, then drain and set aside
in a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, cottage cheese, eggs, and a pinch of salt and pepper
add the rendered lardons-render and saut6 mixture to the bowl and stir until well combined
in a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the potato mixture, followed by half of the gobo-burdock, and finally half of the lardons-render mixture
repeat the layers, finishing with a layer of potato mixture on top
cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown
remove from oven and let rest for 10-15 minutes before serving
